examples: Which is the best choice: IVF or tubal reversal?
The biggest risk after tubal surgery is the possible development of a tubal (ectopic) pregnancy.
Unfortunately this tubal pregnancy ruptures later and emergency surgery must be done to save your life.
The letters, she later learned, stood for bilateral tubal ligation, a form of sterilization.
Approximately 700, 000 women in the U.S. have tubal ligation surgery each year.
